query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A sepia-toned image dominated by deep blacks and pale off-white tones. A dark horizontal band runs across the lower portion of the frame beneath a large black mass at the top. Bright angular shapes occupy the center and right side, with dark overlapping forms and vertical linear elements intersecting the lighter areas.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely blurred sepia-toned photograph rendered with almost no fine detail, causing subjects to dissolve into smeared, soft-edged silhouettes. Deep blacks and pale whites create tonal extremes, yet the shadowy forms—possibly figures and architectural elements—remain ambiguous and abstract against a muted, faded background, abandoning representational clarity in favor of pure shape and gesture.
